spells.name: Bless
spells.description: Bless up to three creatures within range; whenever a target makes an attack roll or saving throw before the spell ends, it adds 1d4 to the roll.

spells.name: Guiding Bolt
spells.description: Make a ranged spell attack; on a hit the target takes 4d6 radiant damage, and the next attack roll against it before the end of your next turn has advantage.

spells.name: Charm Person
spells.description: One humanoid you can see makes a Wisdom save; on a failure it is charmed and friendly to you until the spell ends or you or your allies damage it.

spells.name: Command
spells.description: Speak a one-word command to a creature that can hear and understand you; on a failed Wisdom save it follows the command on its next turn if able.

spells.name: Cure Wounds
spells.description: A creature you touch regains 2d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier hit points, with extra healing when cast using a higher-level slot.

spells.name: Healing Word
spells.description: A creature you can see within range regains hit points as a quick burst of healing magic.

spells.name: Thunderwave
spells.description: A wave of thunderous force erupts from you in a cube, damaging creatures and potentially pushing them away.

spells.name: Hunter's Mark
spells.description: Mark a target you can see; you deal extra damage to it when you hit and gain tracking benefits while the spell lasts.

spells.name: Goodberry
spells.description: Create ten magical berries that restore a small amount of nourishment and healing when eaten.

spells.name: Heroism
spells.description: A willing creature you touch becomes immune to the frightened condition and gains temporary hit points equal to your spellcasting ability modifier at the start of each of its turns.

spells.name: Hex
spells.description: Curse a creature you can see; you deal an extra 1d6 necrotic damage to it on attack hits and it has disadvantage on ability checks made with one chosen ability.

spells.name: Burning Hands
spells.description: A 15-foot cone of fire blasts from you; creatures in the area make Dexterity saves and flammable objects can ignite.

spells.name: Magic Missile
spells.description: Create three darts of magical force that automatically strike one or more visible creatures within range for 1d4 + 1 force damage each.

spells.name: Shield
spells.description: When hit by an attack or targeted by Magic Missile, gain +5 AC until the start of your next turn and take no damage from Magic Missile.

spells.name: Detect Magic
spells.description: Sense the presence of magic within 30 feet and, while concentrating, use the Magic action to perceive magical auras.

spells.name: Sleep
spells.description: Creatures in a 5-foot-radius sphere centered on a point within range make Wisdom saves or become unconscious for the duration until they take damage or are shaken awake.
